title: Regression suite for Windows PE samples
purpose: Add stable regression coverage for Windows PE workflows such as Notepad analysis without depending on a machine-specific system binary.
actions: Define a fixture strategy for small committed PE samples or generated synthetic PE fixtures
Add tests for imports, strings, sections, search, inspect, and hex workflows
Avoid depending on C:\Windows\System32\notepad.exe in CI
Document how users can run the same workflow on local Notepad

criteria: Tests are deterministic on Windows and non-Windows hosts
No proprietary system binary is committed
Command and TUI tests cover PE-specific paths

summary: Added runtime synthetic PE command regression coverage, fixture manifest strategy, and Notepad workflow docs.
